inputText:
Quarterly Update — Q2 2026
GenericCorp · Engineering Org Review
---
Q2 — Ship velocity up 40%
---
We shipped 40% more this quarter than Q1.
Onboarding · Billing · Support — three wins, one quarter.
---
Onboarding redesign
Time-to-value: 11 days faster
---
New billing flow
Conversion lift: +8%
---
In-product hints
Support tickets: -22%
---
Q3 preview
Three bets · one platform investment
---
Thanks. Questions in the next session.
additionalInstructions: Confident exec readout for an internal engineering org review. Visual register: clean editorial — muted blue / warm cream palette, generous negative space, hero-weight typography on title and metric slides, image-led on the closing card. Most slides carry one bold line; preserve text EXACTLY as given. Do not add headings, bullets, sub-text, paragraphs, ledes, or takeaway lists. Layout should treat each slide as a cheat-sheet — photo-able, standalone, makes sense without speaker context. 16:9, generous margins. Avoid generic stock photography; avoid corporate slide patterns; avoid paragraph-heavy slides.

imageOptions.style: Editorial business illustration: muted blue and warm cream palette, abstract data motifs (rising lines, growth shapes, time arrows), generous negative space, soft above-left studio lighting. No people, no logos, no readable text inside images. Clean modern aesthetic — restraint over decoration.
